meaning: n.[地]复理层,厚砂页岩夹层
examples: There is a continental sedimentary-volcanic flysch formation in eastern Guangdong.
Ore types are limonite fractured silicic sandstone, quartz veinlet and bedded flysch rhythm ore.
The upper part of it is a suit of metamorphic flysch formation, and the lower part, metamorphic volcanic-sedimentary rocks.
